mainText:
Promo: "At Bank of Entitlement, we believe you deserve everything, and more. Join us now and unlock the ultimate VIP treatment! "

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, picture this-I'm at my favorite caf, sipping on my organic, fair-trade, hand-crafted latte, when suddenly, a server spills a drop of coffee on my designer shirt. My eyes widen in disbelief as I feel the fabric start to darken ever so slightly. Now, most people would probably just brush it off or ask for a napkin, but not me. Oh no, not Hot Josh. I immediately stand up, causing a scene because this injustice simply cannot go unpunished.I demand to speak to the manager-a middle-aged man with a receding hairline who clearly doesn't appreciate the finer things in life. I explain, with an air of authority, that my shirt cost more than his monthly salary and that this minor mishap is completely unacceptable. The manager stammers an apology and offers to pay for dry cleaning, but that's not enough for me. I demand a full refund for my coffee, a free meal, and a public apology broadcasted over the caf's speakers.The manager looks flustered, but he knows deep down that he can't deny Hot Josh what he rightfully deserves. After a brief negotiation, which involved some theatrics on my part and a few raised eyebrows, I finally walk out of that caf, head held high, with not only a clean shirt but also a free meal voucher and a crowd of impressed onlookers who witnessed my display of entitlement. And that, my friends, is how you turn a minor inconvenience into a major win. Because at the end of the day, Hot Josh always gets what he wants.
